arts.ttl: Real Madrid star sends personal message to Neymar over Santos return
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Rodrygo has taken to social media on Thursday, to send a message of appreciation to fellow countryman Neymar Jr. This comes after the latter confirmed his return…

arts.ttl: Neymar confirms return to Brazil: 'Only Santos can give me the love I need'
arts.sum: Neymar has confirmed he will sign what is expected to be a short-term contract with his boyhood club, Santos, as the Brazil striker aims to recharge his career ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The striker’s return follows the termination of his contract with Saudi Arabian club Al-Hilal.

arts.ttl: Neymar confirms return to his first club Santos
arts.sum: The 32-year-old left the club to join Barcelona in 2013.

arts.ttl: Neymar on Santos return: Like going back in time
arts.sum: Neymar has confimed he will return to his boyhood club, Santos, as he looks to recover from an ACL injury that has heavily disrupted his career in recent seasons.

arts.ttl: 'It's like I'm going back in time' - Neymar agrees Santos return
arts.sum: Neymar agrees to sign for his former side Santos in Brazil, saying "it feels like I'm going back in time".

arts.ttl: Neymar completes emotional Santos return despite MLS talks
arts.sum: Neymar was unquestionably one of the most talented players of his generation but the Brazilian’s career trajectory has been on a downward spiral for quite some time. The 32-year-old...

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Neymar confirms Santos return with emotional video
arts.sum: Neymar has confirmed that he will return to Santos with an emotional social media video. Santos have yet to officially confirm Neymar's arrival, but the player himself has already taken to social media to announce that he will sign with his boyhood club.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star leading Lionel Messi & Neymar in UCL stats
arts.sum: A remarkable statistic, highlighting the excellence of Barcelona star Raphinha in European competition since his arrival at the club, has on Thursday come to the fore online. This, of course,…

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal 25-26 Home, Away & Third Kit Predictions - First of Post Neymar Era
arts.sum: Over the past few days, information about the Al-Hilal 2025-2026 kits was shared by Öpaleak.

arts.ttl: Al Hilal target second Real Madrid star before record Vinicius Junior bid
arts.sum: Al Hilal are interested in signing Real Madrid forward Rodrygo, who joins Vinicius Junior on the PIF's shortlist.
